Metadata.primaryObjective: Resolve the active objective for Fly the Coop.
Metadata.briefing: Mara Venn takes her first unsupervised Aegis Continuity field claim: extract Dorian Vale before his panic, his hardware, or the building turns a routine pickup into a billable disaster.

Data.Name: Mara Venn
Data.Description: Mara Venn is fresh out of Aegis Continuity’s accelerated response academy, where she learned battlefield triage, corporate etiquette, and the fine art of deciding who is worth saving under fire. This is her first premium-client field claim without a senior agent directly supervising her.

Data.Name: Loose Claim Marker
Data.Description: A stray Aegis claim marker left in the scenario package. It has no attached system, no value, and no business being anywhere important.
Data.FlavorText: Someone made a placeholder and forgot to bury the body.

Data.Name: Mara's Field Bag
Data.Description: A compact responder bag with enough room for medical supplies, incident tags, and the small compromises that keep a claim moving.
Data.FlavorText: Standard issue, freshly signed out, still too clean to have earned trust.

Data.Name: Aegis Compact SMG
Data.Description: A short-frame security SMG issued for close escort work. It favors controlled bursts in hallways over elegant solutions.
Data.FlavorText: The academy called it a deterrent. Everyone else heard the word "billable."

Data.Name: Responder Nano Shield
Data.Description: A belt-mounted nanite shield cartridge tuned for Aegis responder doctrine. It blooms a brief kinetic barrier around Mara when incoming force crosses the deductible.
Data.FlavorText: Stamped TESTED. Not stamped INVINCIBLE.

Data.Name: Unfiled Evidence Tag
Data.Description: A loose tag for an item that never made it into inventory. Useful mostly as a reminder that clean data is a kind of fantasy.
Data.FlavorText: No chain of custody, no owner, no mercy.

Data.Name: Dorian's Holdout Pistol
Data.Description: A slim personal sidearm hidden in Dorian's loadout. The finish is expensive, the safety discipline less so.
Data.FlavorText: Polished enough for a boardroom. Loaded for somewhere worse.

Data.Name: Dorian's Personal Nano Shield
Data.Description: A vanity-grade nanite shield registered to Dorian's biometric panic response. It is expensive, discreet, and far more confident than he is.
Data.FlavorText: Protection for people who prefer their danger invisible and their invoices itemized.

Data.Name: Redline Response Gloves
Data.Description: White-and-black responder gloves with sealed palms and red medical indexing. They are built for grip, triage, and not touching anything twice.
Data.FlavorText: Mara can feel the academy checklist through the fingertips.

Data.Name: Portable Transfusion Unit
Data.Description: A sealed field transfusion device for emergency stabilization. It trades elegance for speed and assumes the liability waiver has already been signed.
Data.FlavorText: When the light turns red, someone is paying for another minute.

Data.Name: Redline Neck Brace
Data.Description: A stabilizing collar for sudden stops, hard landings, and the kind of rescue work Mara's academy videos called unlikely.
Data.FlavorText: The warning label has a warning label.

Data.Name: Redline Inner Harness
Data.Description: A fitted underlayer that routes sensor leads, pressure straps, and quick-release anchor points beneath the responder armor.
Data.FlavorText: Every strap has a purpose. Every purpose has a form number.

Data.Name: Redline Rescue Shell
Data.Description: Mara's high-visibility responder shell, cut for movement and instant recognition. Medkit clips, reflective strips, and Aegis branding all compete for the right to save the day.
Data.FlavorText: It says help is here. It also says help has terms.

Data.Name: Redline Stabilizer Boots
Data.Description: Responder boots with reinforced ankles and non-slip soles for wet stairwells, bad landings, and worse decisions.
Data.FlavorText: Designed to keep moving when the scene starts arguing back.

Data.Name: Redline Mobility Pants
Data.Description: Segmented responder pants with reinforced seams, knee flexors, and enough redline trim to keep Mara visible through smoke and bad decisions.
Data.FlavorText: Kneel beside the client. Stand up under pressure.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Circuit-Lined Shirt
Identity.Description: A black inner shirt threaded with cosmetic gold circuits. It suggests taste, access, and an unhelpful amount of disposable income.
Identity.FlavorText: Tailored to look effortless. Charged separately.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Executive Coat
Identity.Description: A long armored coat with angular black panels and gold trim. It is dramatic enough to identify Dorian from across a crisis.
Identity.FlavorText: The kind of coat that enters a room before its owner does.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Personal Cache
Identity.Description: A private inventory store for Dorian's effects. It is orderly in the way expensive people become when other people clean up after them.
Identity.FlavorText: Plenty of space. Very little accountability.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Formal Gloves
Identity.Description: Black gloves with gold-accent seams and polished cuff plates. They are better suited to signatures than survival, but they complete the look.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Tailored Trousers
Identity.Description: Tailored black trousers with enough structured fabric to hold a silhouette under stress. They let Dorian pretend this was always a social call.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Dress Boots
Identity.Description: Polished boots with reinforced soles and gold hardware. Too expensive for running, which is why they may have to.
Identity.FlavorText: Built for marble floors. Currently negotiating with reality.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Formal Gloves
Identity.Description: Black gloves with gold-accent seams and polished cuff plates. They are better suited to signatures than survival, but they complete the look.

Identity.Name: Dorian's Formal Gloves
Identity.Description: Black gloves with gold-accent seams and polished cuff plates. They are better suited to signatures than survival, but they complete the look.

Identity.Name: Blink Ocular Rig
Identity.Description: A head-mounted ocular frame tied into Dorian's cybernetic stack. Its lens blooms with diagnostic light whenever his nerves spike.
Identity.FlavorText: One eye on the exit. One eye on the invoice.

Identity.Name: Responder Medkit
Identity.Description: A compact Aegis kit stocked for bleeding, shock, panic, and the difference between those categories.

Identity.Name: Redline Flechette Tube
Identity.Description: A narrow emergency tube of slashing micro-flechettes for ugly corridor problems.

Identity.Name: Portable Transfusion Unit
Identity.Description: A sealed field transfusion device for emergency stabilization. It trades elegance for speed and assumes the liability waiver has already been signed.
Identity.FlavorText: When the light turns red, someone is paying for another minute.

Identity.Name: Aegis Compact SMG
Identity.Description: A short-frame security SMG issued for close escort work. It favors controlled bursts in hallways over elegant solutions.
Identity.FlavorText: The academy called it a deterrent. Everyone else heard the word "billable."

Data.Name: Dorian's Circuit-Lined Shirt
Data.Description: A black inner shirt threaded with cosmetic gold circuits. It suggests taste, access, and an unhelpful amount of disposable income.
Data.FlavorText: Tailored to look effortless. Charged separately.

Data.Name: Dorian's Executive Coat
Data.Description: A long armored coat with angular black panels and gold trim. It is dramatic enough to identify Dorian from across a crisis.
Data.FlavorText: The kind of coat that enters a room before its owner does.

Data.Name: Dorian's Personal Cache
Data.Description: A private inventory store for Dorian's effects. It is orderly in the way expensive people become when other people clean up after them.
Data.FlavorText: Plenty of space. Very little accountability.

Data.Name: Dorian's Formal Gloves
Data.Description: Black gloves with gold-accent seams and polished cuff plates. They are better suited to signatures than survival, but they complete the look.
Data.FlavorText: No fingerprints, no apologies.

Data.Name: Dorian's Tailored Trousers
Data.Description: Tailored black trousers with enough structured fabric to hold a silhouette under stress. They let Dorian pretend this was always a social call.
Data.FlavorText: Executive cut. Extraction weight.

Data.Name: Dorian's Dress Boots
Data.Description: Polished boots with reinforced soles and gold hardware. Too expensive for running, which is why they may have to.
Data.FlavorText: Built for marble floors. Currently negotiating with reality.

Data.Name: Blink Ocular Rig
Data.Description: A head-mounted ocular frame tied into Dorian's cybernetic stack. Its lens blooms with diagnostic light whenever his nerves spike.
Data.FlavorText: One eye on the exit. One eye on the invoice.

Data.Name: Aegis SMG Magazine
Data.Description: A sealed magazine of compact flechette-safe service rounds for Mara's Aegis SMG.
Data.FlavorText: The academy said to count shots. The magazine makes counting optional until it does not.

Data.Name: Redline Flechette Tube
Data.Description: A narrow emergency tube of slashing micro-flechettes for ugly corridor problems.
Data.FlavorText: Tiny blades, large paperwork.

Data.Name: Responder Medkit
Data.Description: A compact Aegis kit stocked for bleeding, shock, panic, and the difference between those categories.
Data.FlavorText: First aid, then forms.

Data.Name: Aegis Claim Tags
Data.Description: Clip-on incident tags for marking clients, hazards, and anything that may become billable.
Data.FlavorText: Little plastic flags for large institutional confidence.

Data.Name: Dorian's Holdout Magazine
Data.Description: A slim magazine of boutique subsonic rounds sized for Dorian's concealed pistol.
Data.FlavorText: Discretion, serialized.

Data.Name: Dorian's Spare Magazine
Data.Description: A second holdout magazine wrapped in a lint-free cloth that costs more than most apologies.
Data.FlavorText: Prepared by someone on his staff, naturally.

Data.Name: Dorian's Panic Inhaler
Data.Description: A prescription inhaler calibrated for stress spikes, executive oxygen debt, and dramatic exits.
Data.FlavorText: Use before screaming, if possible.

Data.Name: Dorian's Access Fob
Data.Description: A lacquered building credential with guest privileges, private lift claims, and one very nervous owner.
Data.FlavorText: Every door knows his name. Not every door likes him.

Data.Name: Sable's Risk Case
Data.Description: A flat black contract case with sorted ammunition, field tools, and compartments that close too quietly.
Data.FlavorText: Nothing rattles. That is the point.

Data.Name: Korr Compact Sidearm
Data.Description: A suppressed compact pistol maintained for close escort work and decisive misunderstandings.
Data.FlavorText: Quiet enough to keep secrets. Loud enough to end them.

Data.Name: Korr Nano-Veil Shield
Data.Description: A dark-market nanite shield tuned to flare late and hard, just before impact becomes injury.
Data.FlavorText: Invisible armor for people who dislike explanations.

Data.Name: Sable's Glasswire Lenses
Data.Description: Thin gold-rimmed lenses with a private threat feed scrolling where politeness should be.
Data.FlavorText: She watches the room watch itself.

Data.Name: Sable's Black Mesh Top
Data.Description: A high-collar black underlayer with conductive mesh worked into the seams.
Data.FlavorText: Quiet fabric. Loud intent.

Data.Name: Sable's Patterned Longcoat
Data.Description: A fitted black coat with subtle hex patterning and a collar sharp enough to sign contracts for her.
Data.FlavorText: Corporate eveningwear for hostile mornings.

Data.Name: Sable's Grip Gloves
Data.Description: Matte gloves with sensor pads at the fingertips and no wasted shine.
Data.FlavorText: No fingerprints, no flourish.

Data.Name: Sable's Slate Trousers
Data.Description: Tapered black trousers with movement gussets and a knife-flat crease.
Data.FlavorText: Tailoring with an escape route.

Data.Name: Sable's Silent Boots
Data.Description: Low-profile boots with soft strike soles and a reinforced ankle line.
Data.FlavorText: The sound arrives after she does.

Data.Name: Sable's Encrypted Earlink
Data.Description: A narrow encrypted comm bead slaved to a private channel and an even more private agenda.
Data.FlavorText: The voice in her ear never repeats itself.

Data.Name: Subsonic Magazine
Data.Description: A loaded magazine of low-flash subsonic rounds for Sable's compact sidearm.
Data.FlavorText: A small answer to loud questions.

Data.Name: Shock-Cap Rounds
Data.Description: A spare strip of blunt-force capsules meant to stagger rather than shred.
Data.FlavorText: Mercy, in the contractual sense.

Data.Name: Null-Pin Key
Data.Description: A palm-sized bypass key for bad locks, cheap safes, and doors that thought they were done talking.
Data.FlavorText: It does not open doors. It convinces them.

Data.Name: Cold Focus Patch
Data.Description: A square stimulant patch that keeps hands steady and consequences postponed.
Data.FlavorText: Calm is sometimes chemical.

Data.Name: Aegis Supply Crate
Data.Description: A sealed field crate staged for responder overflow supplies, spare tags, and whatever procurement swears was definitely in the manifest.
Data.FlavorText: Heavy enough to imply contents. Light enough to imply budget review.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid's Scrap Sling
Data.Description: A patched scavenger sling sorted for cyber parts, cutters, and whatever still twitches after extraction.

Data.Name: Crowline Scrap Pistol
Data.Description: A chopped-together pistol with clean internals, ugly welds, and no serial remorse.

Data.Name: Crow Patch Shield
Data.Description: A scavenged shield emitter repaired with black-market capacitors and spite.

Data.Name: Compact Scrap Saw
Data.Description: A quiet rotary cutter for cybernetic housings, door hinges, and very bad plans.

Data.Name: Crow Carver Knife
Data.Description: A hooked ceramic knife designed to open armor seams without wasting the parts beneath.

Data.Name: Scavenger Pistol Magazine
Data.Description: A 1x1 magazine of mixed hardball rounds that somehow all feed.

Data.Name: Rook Imani's Media Satchel
Data.Description: A Joy Works satchel with access slates, private-tip ledgers, and enough plausible deniability to stain the lining.

Data.Name: Broker Contact Drive
Data.Description: A slim drive full of backdoor key manifests and Joy Works creator payout routing.

Data.Name: Joy Works Ops Fob
Data.Description: A staff access fob for lift banks, media booths, and server-room excuses.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid
Data.Description: A Crow scavenger breacher who came for Dorian Vale's expensive implants, especially Blink. Her gear is compact, ugly, and practical: cutters, a scrap pistol, and a shield emitter kept alive past warranty.

Data.Name: Rook Imani
Data.Description: A Joy Works media operations handler who knows the premium client was selling server backdoor keys. Rook is trying to stay useful enough that nobody decides he is evidence.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid Glasswire Lenses
Data.Description: Thin street lenses with cracked tactical overlays.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid Inner Layer
Data.Description: A close-cut armored underlayer with scavenged cabling.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid Outer Coat
Data.Description: A black field coat with reinforced shoulders and hidden pockets.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid Work Gloves
Data.Description: Gloves scarred by lock tools and cheap cyber parts.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid Utility Trousers
Data.Description: Hard-wearing trousers with knee guards and tool loops.

Data.Name: Nix Corvid Street Boots
Data.Description: Boots with quiet soles and plated toes.

Data.Name: Rook Imani Glasswire Lenses
Data.Description: Thin street lenses with cracked tactical overlays.

Data.Name: Rook Imani Inner Layer
Data.Description: A close-cut armored underlayer with scavenged cabling.

Data.Name: Rook Imani Outer Coat
Data.Description: A black field coat with reinforced shoulders and hidden pockets.

Data.Name: Rook Imani Work Gloves
Data.Description: Gloves scarred by lock tools and cheap cyber parts.

Data.Name: Rook Imani Utility Trousers
Data.Description: Hard-wearing trousers with knee guards and tool loops.

Data.Name: Rook Imani Street Boots
Data.Description: Boots with quiet soles and plated toes.
